workflow: gsd-new-project -> init phase -> gsd planning -> evaluation

phase_1_init: Persist swap inventory and asset replacement contract
Update primary manifest status: ready | pending_asset | blocked
phase_2_gsd: Plan only from source_of_truth.primary_manifest and contracts

locked_systems_policy: No GSAP/framer-motion/cursor/layout-shell rewrites during normal brand swaps.
note: If required assets are missing, remain in planning-only mode and do not execute implementation batches.
